summary: Executed targeted backend-style regression checks for Android WebView blank-UI root cause conditions (index template script structure + workflow inline transformation). All checks passed.
action_items: Run full GitHub Actions Android build once to validate runtime behavior inside actual APK/WebView environment (current checks are static + parser-level regressions).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Added regression tests for: single inline placeholder, absence of duplicated `})();})();`, syntax validation of index.html script blocks, and syntax validation after workflow-style inline transform of view.js.
rca of the issue: Blank Android UI likely occurred because malformed template script structure (duplicated IIFE closer and duplicated placeholder) can break JS parsing/execution before bridge setup/mount. Current repository state no longer exhibits those conditions, and transformed inline output parses successfully.
